name: Automation & Growth
description: Full autonomous content machine — blog, affiliate content, social media, SEO monitoring, UGC pipeline
gate: Blog auto-publishes 3x/week, affiliate content auto-generates weekly, Pinterest pins daily, SEO reports weekly

userStories.title: Upgrade blog pipeline to use local image gen (end cloud dependency)
userStories.description: As the blog pipeline operator, I need hero images generated locally via ComfyUI so every blog post costs $0 in image generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Blog pipeline cron generates hero images via Z-Image-Turbo (not ZAI cloud)
Cloud API remains as documented fallback only
3 consecutive blog posts published with locally-generated hero images
Image generation failure triggers automatic retry + cloud fallback
Build + deploy still works end-to-end
userStories.notes: This is the culmination of Phase 1 + Phase 3 pipeline work. Local gen as default, cloud as safety net.

userStories.title: Build affiliate content cron (weekly: research + write + publish review)
userStories.description: As a content operator, I need a weekly cron that produces a new tool review so the directory grows consistently without manual effort.
acceptanceCriteria: Cron runs every Sunday at 9am
Researches trending tools in directory categories
Writes 1000-2000 word review with pros/cons/pricing/features
Generates hero image locally
Adds affiliate links with tracking
Saves draft for human review (auto-publish or manual approve)
userStories.notes: Extend existing blog pipeline cron pattern. Different content template (review vs blog).

userStories.title: Pinterest auto-pin cron (daily: generate pin + schedule)
userStories.description: As a Pinterest growth operator, I need daily auto-pins so the account stays active and drives consistent referral traffic.
acceptanceCriteria: Cron runs daily at 11am EST
Picks content from recently published reviews/blog posts
Generates pin image using Canva/template
Posts to relevant Pinterest board with SEO-optimized description
Tracks pin performance (impressions, clicks) in analytics
Rate-limits to avoid Pinterest spam detection
userStories.notes: Pinterest API rate limits: 1000 pins/day for business accounts. Stay well under.

userStories.title: X/Twitter auto-post cron (daily: share new content)
userStories.description: As a social media operator, I need auto-posts on X/Twitter when new content publishes so social channels stay active.
acceptanceCriteria: Cron triggers on new blog post or review publish
Generates tweet with title + link + relevant hashtags
Posts via xurl CLI (already available)
Scheduling: stagger posts 2-3 hours apart if multiple publishes
No duplicate posts for same content
userStories.notes: xurl skill already exists. Use Hermes cron + xurl for posting.

userStories.title: SEO monitoring cron (weekly: track rankings, backlinks, Core Web Vitals)
userStories.description: As an SEO operator, I need weekly reports on search performance so I can identify issues and opportunities.
acceptanceCriteria: Cron runs every Monday at 8am
Checks Google Search Console data: impressions, clicks, CTR, positions
Checks Core Web Vitals for key pages (LCP, CLS, INP)
Checks backlink count and new referring domains
Compares week-over-week changes
Report delivered to Discord with highlights + action items
Flags significant ranking drops (>5 positions)
userStories.notes: Google Search Console API for data. Lighthouse/PageSpeed Insights for CWV. Ahrefs/Moz for backlinks (if budget allows).

userStories.title: Opportunity Scanner integration with affiliate pipeline
userStories.description: As a business operator, I need the opportunity scanner to surface affiliate programs and trending tools, not just general opportunities.
acceptanceCriteria: Opportunity Scanner cron (every 4h) includes affiliate program discovery
Surfaces new tools with existing affiliate programs
Surfaces trending tools with high search volume + commercial intent
Matches opportunities to existing directory categories
Auto-creates draft review placeholder for top opportunities
Reports new opportunities to Discord with affiliate program details
userStories.notes: Opportunity Scanner cron already exists (every 4h). Extend its prompt to include affiliate/tool discovery.

userStories.title: Revenue tracking dashboard (affiliate + ads + services)
userStories.description: As a business owner, I need a unified revenue dashboard so I can see all income streams in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows: affiliate revenue, ad revenue (if any), service inquiries from website
Revenue broken down by: source, tool, category, month
Trend chart: month-over-month revenue growth
Affiliate conversion rate (clicks → purchases)
Monthly auto-report delivered to Discord
Dashboard accessible via local URL or admin page
userStories.notes: Start with affiliate data from P3-014. Add other streams as they come online.

userStories.title: UGC video pipeline integration (wire to agent delegation)
userStories.description: As the video content operator, I need the UGC pipeline fully wired to Hermes agent delegation so videos can be produced autonomously.
acceptanceCriteria: COO profile can delegate video production tasks to worker profiles
Full pipeline: research → script → TTS → images → assembly → QC → delivery
Chatterbox V3 for voiceover (local, emotion profiles)
ComfyUI for scene images (local, style consistent)
Delivered to Discord for human review before upload
End-to-end test: produce one complete video autonomously
userStories.notes: UGC pipeline plan exists at .hermes/plans/2026-06-12_ugc-content-pipeline.md. Phase 1-3 of that plan need completion first.

userStories.title: Cross-promotion engine (blog → video, video → blog, both → Pinterest)
userStories.description: As a growth operator, I need content cross-promotion automated so every piece of content amplifies every other piece.
acceptanceCriteria: New blog post → auto-tweet + auto-pin + suggest video topic
New video → auto-tweet + auto-pin + suggest blog expansion
New review → auto-tweet + auto-pin + suggest comparison post
Cross-links added automatically (blog mentions tools reviewed in directory)
Content calendar maintained across all channels
No duplicate content across channels (each platform gets unique framing)
userStories.notes: The flywheel effect: blog → SEO → traffic → affiliate clicks → revenue → reinvest in content.

userStories.title: Monthly growth report cron (metrics + next actions)
userStories.description: As a business owner, I need a monthly growth report so I can track progress against goals and adjust strategy.
acceptanceCriteria: Cron runs on the 1st of each month
Report includes: traffic, revenue, content published, subscriber growth, SEO rankings
Compares to previous month and to goals
Highlights: top performing content, worst performing, anomalies
Recommends: 3-5 action items for next month
Delivered to Discord as formatted report
Saved to ralph/monthly-reports/ for historical tracking
userStories.notes: This is the feedback loop that closes the Ralph system: measure → learn → iterate → improve.
